g.text: M2: DISTANCE METRICS & SIMD FAST PATHS

text.tspan: (Prevents SIMD Unaligned Load General Protection Faults)

ul.li: Cache Locality: Struct metadata (0x00-0x17) resides in same cache line.
Page Efficiency: Ensure vectors are allocated via posix_memalign.
K1-K7: Mask registers for tail-end vector processing.

g.text: VMLTPS zmm1, zmm0, zmm0 | squares = va * va
VSQRTSS xmm3, xmm3, xmm2 | norm = sqrt(sum)

g.title: Core Instruction: VFMADD213PS zmm1, zmm2, zmm3
Core Instruction: VFMADD213PS zmm1, zmm2, zmm3
